versions.version_description: Tab and chords based off the studio recorded version (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vYueUekxZNU).
Different chords and chord values and voicings.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: If I Ever Leave This World Alive

content:
Transpose -2 for the key of the recording.


[Intro]

[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  x2


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
  One fine day, you'll look at me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
  And you will know our love was, meant to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
  One fine day, you're gonna want me for your girl[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
  The arms I long for, will open wide[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                [ch]C[/ch]
  And you'll be proud to have me, walking right by your side[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
  One fine day, you're gonna want me for your girl[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
   Though I know you're the kind of boy[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]         [ch]C6[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
  Who only wants to run around[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
   I'll keep waiting, and, someday darling[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
You'll come to me when you want to settle down, oh[/tab]


[Verse 3]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
  One fine day, we'll meet once more[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                 [ch]C[/ch]
  And then you'll want the love you threw away before[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
  One fine day, you're gonna want me for your girl[/tab]
[tab]([ch]G[/ch])        [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D7[/ch]
  One fine day, oh      ohh![/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
  One fine day, you're gonna want me for your girl[/tab]

([ch]G[/ch]) [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
 [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]


[Solo]

[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  x6

(fade out)
